# PKCS1MD5

**Type Property**

Data to be signed is an MD5 hash.

## Declaration

```swift
static var PKCS1MD5: SecPadding { get }
```

## Discussion

Standard ASN.1 padding is done, as well as PKCS1 padding of the underlying RSA operation. Used with [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyRawSign(_:_:_:_:_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyRawVerify(_:_:_:_:_:_:)] only.
